conceptualization.inspiration: The painting aims to evoke the majestic and towering essence of mountain ranges, capturing both their grandeur and the subtle interplay of light and shadow across their peaks and valleys.

composition.layout_guide: The composition is to be free of hard outlines, using color gradients and contrasts to define forms. The visual flow should guide the eye from the foreground, with sharper and darker tones, to the misty and lighter-colored background mountains, simulating atmospheric perspective.
focal_areas: central peak which is the highest, drawing initial focus
a sunlit side of a mountain contrasting against shadowed areas

techniques.wet_on_wet: Used to create soft backgrounds and distant mountains
techniques.salt_technique: Applied in selective areas to create a snow-like texture
techniques.lifting: Employed gently to highlight ridges and edges of the mountains

visual_elements.lighting: Subtle lighting, envisioning either an early morning or late afternoon setting, taking advantage of the low angles of the sun
visual_elements.scale: Dramatic scaling to emphasize the towering nature of the peaks compared to the valleys
visual_elements.texture: Minimal texture in the foreground increasing in complexity as it approaches the central and background mountains
